'''Ganji''' was an alien [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] living during the time of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]].

He was operating on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Dargulli/Legends|Dargulli]] in [[1 BBY/Legends|1 BBY]], where he and a group of other hunters attempted to [[Ambush on Dargulli|kill]] [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]]. The [[Dark Lord of the Sith/Legends|Dark Lord]] proved more than a match, however, killing Ganji and the other hunters.

==Appearances==
*[[Empire 4|''Empire'' 4]] {{1st}}
